title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 92.070 - Informality not to affect validity of books
text:
92.070.  Informality not to affect validity of books. — Any failure to make or complete the back tax books within the time required by sections 92.050 and 92.060, or any informality in making said back tax books, shall in no way affect the validity of the same.
(RSMo 1939 § 7740) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 7592; 1919 § 9002; 1909 § 9853
